title: selaginella tomentosa
intro: Selaginella tomentosa, also known as spikemoss, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella tomentosa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
